features: New inclusion of the Changelog window (What you're reading right now!)
New BF Death anim in the style of BITCRUSH'D for selected songs
New Checkbox sprite for Options Menu
Icon switches to new Duo Icons when both characters are singing in selected songs
changes: The Alphabet class is now modified to use the Delicatus font through FlxText, rather than using a spritesheet
Pause Menu's texts are now centered and have > < indicators

changes.text: The animations to the following elements are now constantly synced with eachother:
Scroll speed adjustments for better gameplay
subtexts: Suguru scroll speed event is now -0.24 slower
Ok II scroll speed is now -0.3 slower

fixes: Healthbar now properly disappears once Girlfriend notes are pressed while cinematic bars are active (all Duo Opponent Songs)
GF sprite animations now play completely through the Unison Notetype, whereas previously were cut short
